[index.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28262034/index.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>Eureka Procrast</title>
<style>
:root {
  --bg:#030303;
  --white:#f4f4f4;
  --muted:rgba(255,255,255,.62);
  --glass:rgba(8,8,10,.58);
  --line:rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  --pink:#ff74bd;
  --green:#77ffc7;
}
* { box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0; }
body {
  min-height:100vh;
  overflow:hidden;
  background:#000;
  color:var(--white);
  font-family: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
}
button,input { font-family:inherit; }
.app {
  width:100vw;
  height:100vh;
  position:relative;
  background:#000;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.screen {
  position:absolute;
  inset:0;
  display:none;
  opacity:0;
  transition:opacity .35s ease;
}
.screen.active {
  display:block;
  opacity:1;
}
.cover {
  background:#000;
  display:none;
  place-items:center;
  padding:32px;
}
.cover.active { display:grid; }
.logo-wrap {
  width:min(760px,78vw);
  max-width:760px;
  text-align:center;
  animation:fadeUp .8s ease both;
}
.logo-wrap img {
  width:100%;
  display:block;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 0 24px rgba(255,255,255,.18));
}
.japan {
  position:absolute;
  font-size:70px;
  opacity:.18;
  font-weight:800;
  letter-spacing:.2em;
  writing-mode:vertical-rl;
  user-select:none;
}
.japan.one { left:5vw; top:9vh; color:var(--pink); }
.japan.two { right:5vw; bottom:10vh; color:var(--green); }
.cover-btn {
  position:absolute;
  bottom:58px;
  left:50%;
  transform:translateX(-50%);
  padding:16px 44px;
  border-radius:999px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  color:#fff;
  letter-spacing:.32em;
  font-size:13px;
  cursor:pointer;
  backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
}
.cover-btn:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,.16); }

.bg-samurai {
  position:absolute;
  inset:0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,.38), rgba(0,0,0,.88)),
    url("data:image/png;base64,") center/cover no-repeat;
  filter:contrast(1.08) brightness(.88);
}
.bg-samurai::after {
  content:"";
  position:absolute;
  inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 12%, rgba(255,255,255,.16), transparent 24%),
             radial-gradient(circle at 50% 105%, rgba(255,255,255,.08), transparent 30%);
}
.topbar {
  position:absolute;
  top:22px;
  left:24px;
  right:24px;
  z-index:5;
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;
  pointer-events:none;
}
.top-actions {
  display:flex;
  gap:10px;
  pointer-events:auto;
}
.icon-btn {
  min-width:44px;
  height:38px;
  padding:0 13px;
  display:grid;
  place-items:center;
  border-radius:999px;
  border:1px solid var(--line);
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.36);
  color:white;
  backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
  cursor:pointer;
  font-size:13px;
}
.brand-small {
  pointer-events:auto;
  line-height:1.1;
}
.brand-small h1 {
  font-size:22px;
  letter-spacing:.42em;
  font-weight:700;
}
.brand-small p {
  margin-top:4px;
  font-size:10px;
  letter-spacing:.45em;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);
}
.panel {
  position:relative;
  z-index:3;
  width:min(92vw,420px);
  margin:auto;
  top:50%;
  transform:translateY(-50%);
  padding:30px;
  border:1px solid var(--line);
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.48);
  border-radius:28px;
  backdrop-filter:blur(18px);
  box-shadow:0 0 70px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
}
.panel h2 {
  font-size:28px;
  font-weight:500;
  margin-bottom:10px;
  letter-spacing:.04em;
}
.panel .sub {
  color:var(--muted);
  font-size:14px;
  margin-bottom:25px;
  line-height:1.5;
}
.form {
  display:grid;
  gap:13px;
}
input {
  width:100%;
  padding:15px 16px;
  border-radius:16px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  color:white;
  outline:none;
  font-size:15px;
}
input::placeholder { color:rgba(255,255,255,.35); }
.primary {
  margin-top:8px;
  padding:15px 18px;
  border-radius:16px;
  border:none;
  background:white;
  color:#000;
  font-weight:800;
  letter-spacing:.08em;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.link {
  border:none;
  background:transparent;
  color:var(--green);
  cursor:pointer;
  margin-top:8px;
  font-size:14px;
}
.error {
  min-height:18px;
  color:#ff9cbd;
  font-size:13px;
}
.home-content {
  position:relative;
  z-index:3;
  height:100%;
  padding:72px 28px 24px;
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
}
.datetime {
  text-align:center;
  margin-top:0;
}
.time {
  font-size:54px;
  font-weight:200;
  letter-spacing:.05em;
}
.date {
  margin-top:5px;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);
  font-size:14px;
}
.main-card {
  margin:22px auto 0;
  width:min(680px,92vw);
  padding:28px;
  border-radius:32px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.38);
  backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
  text-align:center;
}
.quote {
  font-size:25px;
  line-height:1.35;
  font-weight:300;
}
.today {
  margin-top:20px;
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  gap:12px;
}
.mini {
  text-align:left;
  padding:16px;
  border-radius:20px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.055);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
}
.mini span {
  display:block;
  font-size:11px;
  letter-spacing:.22em;
  color:var(--pink);
  margin-bottom:8px;
}
.mini:nth-child(2) span { color:var(--green); }
.nav {
  margin-top:auto;
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);
  gap:12px;
  width:min(720px,94vw);
  align-self:center;
}
.nav button {
  padding:16px 8px;
  border-radius:22px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.44);
  color:white;
  backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
  cursor:pointer;
  min-height:82px;
}
.nav .ico {
  display:block;
  font-size:23px;
  margin-bottom:8px;
  opacity:.9;
}
.nav .pink { color:var(--pink); }
.nav .green { color:var(--green); }
.page {
  position:absolute;
  inset:0;
  z-index:10;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.88);
  backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
  padding:86px 26px 28px;
  display:none;
  overflow:auto;
}
.page.active { display:block; }
.back {
  position:absolute;
  top:24px;
  left:24px;
}
.page h2 {
  font-size:34px;
  margin-bottom:6px;
  font-weight:300;
}
.page-desc {
  color:var(--muted);
  margin-bottom:22px;
}
.row {
  display:flex;
  gap:10px;
  margin-bottom:16px;
}
.row input { flex:1; }
.add {
  width:54px;
  border-radius:16px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.09);
  color:white;
  font-size:24px;
}
.item {
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  gap:12px;
  padding:15px;
  border-radius:18px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.055);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  margin-bottom:10px;
}
.item.done .txt { text-decoration:line-through; opacity:.45; }
.check {
  width:26px;
  height:26px;
  border-radius:50%;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.35);
  display:grid;
  place-items:center;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.item.done .check {
  background:var(--green);
  color:#000;
}
.txt { flex:1; }
.del {
  background:transparent;
  border:none;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);
  font-size:18px;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.calendar {
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);
  gap:8px;
  margin-top:18px;
}
.day {
  aspect-ratio:1;
  display:grid;
  place-items:center;
  border-radius:14px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.055);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  font-size:13px;
}
.day.active {
  background:rgba(119,255,199,.18);
  border-color:rgba(119,255,199,.5);
}
.profile-box {
  display:grid;
  gap:12px;
}
.stat {
  padding:18px;
  border-radius:20px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.055);
}
.stat b { color:var(--green); font-size:26px; }
.ai-box {
  padding:20px;
  border-radius:22px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,116,189,.25);
  background:rgba(255,116,189,.07);
  line-height:1.6;
}
@keyframes fadeUp {
  from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(20px); }
  to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
}
@media (min-width:760px){
  .container-desktop { width:100%; height:100%; }
  .home-content { max-width:950px; margin:0 auto; }
}

.week-start{
  margin:18px 0 16px;
  width:100%;
  padding:16px;
  border-radius:18px;
  border:1px solid rgba(119,255,199,.28);
  background:rgba(119,255,199,.08);
  color:white;
  font-weight:800;
  letter-spacing:.14em;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.week-form{
  display:none;
  margin-bottom:18px;
  padding:18px;
  border-radius:22px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.045);
}
.week-form.active{display:block}
.week-form label{
  display:block;
  margin:12px 0 7px;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);
  font-size:12px;
  letter-spacing:.18em;
}
.week-form select,.week-form textarea{
  width:100%;
  padding:13px 14px;
  border-radius:15px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.35);
  color:white;
  outline:none;
}
.week-form textarea{min-height:82px;resize:none}
.week-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);
  gap:8px;
  margin-top:16px;
}
.week-day{
  min-height:120px;
  padding:10px 7px;
  border-radius:17px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.045);
  font-size:11px;
}
.week-day b{
  display:block;
  margin-bottom:8px;
  color:var(--green);
  font-size:11px;
  letter-spacing:.12em;
}
.week-task{
  margin:6px 0;
  padding:7px;
  border-radius:10px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);
  line-height:1.25;
}
@media(max-width:720px){
  .week-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .week-day{min-height:auto}
}


.month-tools{
  margin:14px 0 12px;
  padding:14px;
  border-radius:18px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.045);
}
.month-tools p{
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);
  font-size:13px;
  line-height:1.5;
  margin-bottom:10px;
}
.day{
  position:relative;
  cursor:pointer;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.day.has-plan{
  border-color:rgba(255,116,189,.45);
  background:rgba(255,116,189,.11);
}
.day small{
  position:absolute;
  bottom:5px;
  left:4px;
  right:4px;
  font-size:8px;
  line-height:1;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.72);
  white-space:nowrap;
  overflow:hidden;
  text-overflow:ellipsis;
}
.smart-board{
  margin-bottom:20px;
  padding:20px;
  border-radius:24px;
  border:1px solid rgba(119,255,199,.2);
  background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(119,255,199,.08),rgba(255,116,189,.06));
}
.smart-board h3{
  font-weight:300;
  letter-spacing:.16em;
  color:var(--green);
  margin-bottom:12px;
}
.smart-board p{
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.68);
  line-height:1.55;
  font-size:14px;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}
.smart-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  gap:10px;
}
.smart-grid textarea,.smart-grid input,.smart-grid select{
  width:100%;
  padding:13px 14px;
  border-radius:15px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.35);
  color:white;
  outline:none;
}
.smart-grid textarea{
  grid-column:1/-1;
  min-height:78px;
  resize:none;
}
.smart-card{
  padding:18px;
  border-radius:22px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);
  margin-bottom:12px;
}
.smart-card .tag{
  display:inline-block;
  margin-bottom:10px;
  padding:5px 10px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:rgba(119,255,199,.1);
  color:var(--green);
  font-size:10px;
  letter-spacing:.18em;
}
.smart-card h4{
  font-size:20px;
  margin-bottom:8px;
  font-weight:500;
}
.smart-card p{
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.67);
  line-height:1.5;
  font-size:14px;
}
.smart-actions{
  display:flex;
  gap:8px;
  margin-top:12px;
}
.smart-actions button{
  flex:1;
  padding:10px;
  border-radius:14px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  color:white;
  cursor:pointer;
}
@media(max-width:720px){
  .smart-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}


.profile-hero{
  padding:22px;
  border-radius:28px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(255,116,189,.08),rgba(119,255,199,.08));
  margin-bottom:18px;
  text-align:center;
}
.profile-avatar{
  width:82px;
  height:82px;
  margin:0 auto 14px;
  border-radius:50%;
  display:grid;
  place-items:center;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  font-size:34px;
}
.profile-hero h3{
  font-size:28px;
  font-weight:300;
  margin-bottom:6px;
}
.profile-hero p{
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);
  line-height:1.5;
}
.profile-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  gap:12px;
  margin-top:16px;
}
.profile-action{
  margin-top:18px;
  width:100%;
  padding:16px;
  border-radius:18px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  color:white;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.logout{
  background:rgba(255,116,189,.08);
  border-color:rgba(255,116,189,.25);
  color:#ffb4d8;
}


.ai-mode{
  display:grid;
  gap:14px;
}
.ai-message{
  padding:18px;
  border-radius:22px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);
  line-height:1.6;
  animation:fadeUp .5s ease;
}
.ai-message.motivate{
  border-color:rgba(119,255,199,.25);
  background:rgba(119,255,199,.07);
}
.ai-message.direct{
  border-color:rgba(255,116,189,.25);
  background:rgba(255,116,189,.07);
}
.ai-message span{
  display:block;
  margin-bottom:10px;
  font-size:11px;
  letter-spacing:.24em;
  color:var(--green);
}
.ai-actions{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  gap:10px;
  margin-top:16px;
}
.ai-actions button{
  padding:14px;
  border-radius:16px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  color:white;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.home-alert{
  position:absolute;
  left:50%;
  bottom:145px;
  transform:translateX(-50%);
  width:min(680px,92vw);
  margin:0 auto;
  padding:16px 18px;
  border-radius:22px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,116,189,.2);
  background:rgba(255,116,189,.08);
  backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
  animation:fadeUp .5s ease;
}
.home-alert strong{
  color:#ffb6d7;
  display:block;
  margin-bottom:6px;
  font-size:12px;
  letter-spacing:.18em;
}


.month-title{
  margin-top:8px;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);
  font-size:13px;
  letter-spacing:.16em;
}
.calendar{
  grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);
}
.week-head{
  height:30px;
  display:grid;
  place-items:center;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);
  font-size:10px;
  letter-spacing:.12em;
}
.day.empty{
  opacity:.18;
  cursor:default;
}
.ai-question{
  margin-top:18px;
  padding:18px;
  border-radius:22px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.045);
}
.ai-question textarea{
  width:100%;
  min-height:76px;
  resize:none;
  padding:14px;
  border-radius:16px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.35);
  color:white;
  outline:none;
}
.ai-answer{
  margin-top:12px;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);
  line-height:1.6;
  font-size:14px;
}


.quick-habits{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);
  gap:8px;
  margin:10px 0 14px;
}
.quick-habits button{
  padding:11px 10px;
  border-radius:14px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.055);
  color:white;
  cursor:pointer;
  font-size:12px;
}
.day-picks{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);
  gap:7px;
  margin-top:8px;
}
.day-picks button{
  padding:10px 0;
  border-radius:12px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.045);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);
  cursor:pointer;
  font-size:11px;
}
.day-picks button.selected{
  background:rgba(119,255,199,.14);
  border-color:rgba(119,255,199,.45);
  color:white;
}
.track-actions{
  display:flex;
  gap:8px;
  margin-top:10px;
}
.track-actions button{
  flex:1;
  padding:9px;
  border-radius:12px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.055);
  color:white;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.track-actions button.done-btn{
  border-color:rgba(119,255,199,.35);
  color:var(--green);
}
.track-actions button.fail-btn{
  border-color:rgba(255,116,189,.35);
  color:var(--pink);
}
.progress-mini{
  margin:12px 0 16px;
  padding:14px;
  border-radius:18px;
  border:1px solid rgba(119,255,199,.22);
  background:rgba(119,255,199,.06);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);
  line-height:1.5;
}
.progress-bar{
  margin-top:10px;
  height:8px;
  border-radius:99px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  overflow:hidden;
}
.progress-fill{
  height:100%;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--green),var(--pink));
  width:0%;
}

</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">
  <section id="cover" class="screen cover active">
    <div class="japan one">集中</div>
    <div class="japan two">改善</div>
    <div class="logo-wrap"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Eureka Procrast"></div>
    <button class="cover-btn" onclick="go('login')" data-i18n="start">EMPEZAR</button>
  </section>

  <section id="login" class="screen">
    <div class="bg-samurai"></div>
    <div class="topbar">
      <button class="icon-btn" onclick="toggleSound()" id="soundBtn">🔊</button>
      <button class="icon-btn" onclick="toggleLang()" id="langBtn">🇪🇸</button>
    </div>
    <div class="panel">
      <h2 data-i18n="welcome">Bienvenido</h2>
      <p class="sub" data-i18n="welcomeText">Entra en tu espacio de enfoque. Tus hábitos y objetivos se guardarán en este usuario.</p>
      <div class="form">
        <input id="user" placeholder="Usuario" data-ph-es="Usuario" data-ph-en="Username">
        <input id="pass" type="password" placeholder="Contraseña" data-ph-es="Contraseña" data-ph-en="Password">
        <div class="error" id="loginError"></div>
        <button class="primary" onclick="login()" data-i18n="enter">ENTRAR</button>
        <button class="link" onclick="register()" data-i18n="register">Registrarse</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="home" class="screen">
    <div class="bg-samurai"></div>
    <div class="topbar">
      <div class="brand-small">
        <h1>EUREKA</h1>
        <p>PROCRAST</p>
      </div>
      <div class="top-actions">
        <button class="icon-btn" onclick="toggleSound()" id="soundBtn2">🔊</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" onclick="toggleLang()" id="langBtn2">🇪🇸</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" onclick="openPage('profile')" data-i18n="profileShort">Perfil</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="home-content">
      <div class="datetime">
        <div class="time" id="clock">00:00</div>
        <div class="date" id="date">---</div>
      </div>

      <div class="main-card">
        <div class="quote" id="quote">La disciplina empieza cuando dejas de esperar motivación.</div>
        <div class="today">
          <div class="mini"><span data-i18n="habitDay">HÁBITO DEL DÍA</span><b id="habitDay">1 hora de estudio</b></div>
          <div class="mini"><span data-i18n="mainGoal">OBJETIVO PRINCIPAL</span><b id="mainGoal">Mejorar disciplina diaria</b></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="home-alert" id="homeAlert">
        <strong>EUREKA IA · RECORDATORIO</strong>
        Dentro de 30 minutos tienes pendiente tu hábito principal.
      </div>

      <div class="nav">
        <button onclick="openPage('ai')"><span class="ico green">✦</span>Eureka IA</button>
        <button onclick="openPage('habits')"><span class="ico pink">✓</span><span data-i18n="habits">Hábitos</span></button>
        <button onclick="openPage('goals')"><span class="ico green">◎</span><span data-i18n="goals">Objetivos</span></button>
        <button onclick="openPage('profile')"><span class="ico pink">◧</span><span data-i18n="profile">Perfil</span></button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="habits" class="page">
    <button class="icon-btn back" onclick="closePages()">←</button>
    <h2 data-i18n="habits">Hábitos</h2>
    <p class="page-desc" data-i18n="habitsDesc">Organiza tu semana y convierte tus hábitos en una rutina clara.</p>

    <button class="week-start" onclick="toggleWeekForm()" data-i18n="startHabits">EMPEZAR HÁBITOS</button>

    <div id="weekForm" class="week-form">
      <label data-i18n="askHabit">¿Qué hábito quieres hacer?</label>
      <input id="weekHabit" placeholder="Ej: estudiar, entrenar, leer..." data-ph-es="Ej: estudiar, entrenar, leer..." data-ph-en="Example: study, train, read...">

      <div class="quick-habits">
        <button onclick="setQuickHabit('Estudiar')">Estudiar</button>
        <button onclick="setQuickHabit('Entrenar')">Entrenar</button>
        <button onclick="setQuickHabit('Leer')">Leer</button>
        <button onclick="setQuickHabit('Menos móvil')">Menos móvil</button>
        <button onclick="setQuickHabit('Dormir temprano')">Dormir temprano</button>
        <button onclick="setQuickHabit('Ordenar tareas')">Ordenar tareas</button>
      </div>

      <label data-i18n="askDays">¿Qué días de la semana?</label>
      <select id="weekDays" onchange="syncPresetDays()">
        <option value="custom">Elegir días</option>
        <option value="all">Toda la semana</option>
        <option value="weekdays">Lunes a viernes</option>
        <option value="alternate">Lunes, miércoles y viernes</option>
        <option value="weekend">Fin de semana</option>
      </select>
      <div class="day-picks" id="dayPicks">
        <button data-day="lunes" onclick="toggleDayPick(event)">L</button>
        <button data-day="martes" onclick="toggleDayPick(event)">M</button>
        <button data-day="miercoles" onclick="toggleDayPick(event)">X</button>
        <button data-day="jueves" onclick="toggleDayPick(event)">J</button>
        <button data-day="viernes" onclick="toggleDayPick(event)">V</button>
        <button data-day="sabado" onclick="toggleDayPick(event)">S</button>
        <button data-day="domingo" onclick="toggleDayPick(event)">D</button>
      </div>

      <label data-i18n="askTime">¿Cuánto tiempo?</label>
      <input id="weekTime" placeholder="Ej: 1 hora, 30 minutos..." data-ph-es="Ej: 1 hora, 30 minutos..." data-ph-en="Example: 1 hour, 30 minutes...">

      <label data-i18n="askNote">Nota rápida</label>
      <textarea id="weekNote" placeholder="Ej: hacerlo antes de coger el móvil" data-ph-es="Ej: hacerlo antes de coger el móvil" data-ph-en="Example: do it before using the phone"></textarea>

      <button class="primary" onclick="createWeeklyHabit()" data-i18n="createRoutine">CREAR RUTINA SEMANAL</button>
    </div>

    <div class="row"><input id="habitInput" placeholder="Nuevo hábito" data-ph-es="Nuevo hábito" data-ph-en="New habit"><button class="add" onclick="addHabit()">+</button></div>
    <div class="progress-mini" id="habitProgressBox">
      Seguimiento de hábitos
      <div class="progress-bar"><div class="progress-fill" id="habitProgressFill"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div id="habitList"></div>

    <h3 style="margin:24px 0 8px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.16em;color:var(--green)" data-i18n="weeklyCalendar">CALENDARIO SEMANAL</h3>
    <div class="week-grid" id="weekGrid"></div>

    <h3 style="margin:24px 0 8px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.16em;color:var(--pink)" data-i18n="monthlyTracker">TRACKER MENSUAL</h3>
    <div class="month-tools">
      <p data-i18n="monthHelp">Pulsa un día del mes para dejar preparado qué hábito toca ese día.</p>
      <div class="row">
        <input id="monthHabitInput" placeholder="Hábito para el día seleccionado" data-ph-es="Hábito para el día seleccionado" data-ph-en="Habit for selected day">
        <button class="add" onclick="saveMonthHabit()">✓</button>
      </div>
      <p id="selectedDayLabel">Día seleccionado: ninguno</p>
    </div>
    <div class="month-title" id="monthTitle"></div>
    <div class="calendar" id="calendar"></div>
  </section>

  <section id="goals" class="page">
    <button class="icon-btn back" onclick="closePages()">←</button>
    <h2 data-i18n="goals">Objetivos</h2>
    <p class="page-desc" data-i18n="goalsDesc">Una pizarra inteligente para convertir deseos en objetivos reales.</p>

    <div class="smart-board">
      <h3 data-i18n="smartBoard">PIZARRA INTELIGENTE</h3>
      <p data-i18n="smartBoardText">Responde con sinceridad. La app ordenará tu objetivo y te recordará el precio que estás dispuesto a pagar.</p>
      <div class="smart-grid">
        <input id="smartGoal" placeholder="¿Qué quieres conseguir?" data-ph-es="¿Qué quieres conseguir?" data-ph-en="What do you want to achieve?">
        <select id="smartPriority">
          <option value="Alta">Prioridad alta</option>
          <option value="Media">Prioridad media</option>
          <option value="Baja">Prioridad baja</option>
        </select>
        <input id="smartDeadline" placeholder="¿Para cuándo?" data-ph-es="¿Para cuándo?" data-ph-en="By when?">
        <input id="smartMeasure" placeholder="¿Cómo sabrás que lo lograste?" data-ph-es="¿Cómo sabrás que lo lograste?" data-ph-en="How will you know you achieved it?">
        <textarea id="smartSacrifice" placeholder="¿Qué estás dispuesto a sacrificar? Ej: menos móvil, menos salir, dormir antes..." data-ph-es="¿Qué estás dispuesto a sacrificar? Ej: menos móvil, menos salir, dormir antes..." data-ph-en="What are you willing to sacrifice? Example: less phone, less going out, sleep earlier..."></textarea>
      </div>
      <button class="primary" onclick="createSmartGoal()" data-i18n="createSmartGoal">CREAR OBJETIVO INTELIGENTE</button>
    </div>

    <div class="row"><input id="goalInput" placeholder="Nuevo objetivo rápido" data-ph-es="Nuevo objetivo rápido" data-ph-en="Quick new goal"><button class="add" onclick="addGoal()">+</button></div>
    <div id="goalList"></div>
    <div id="smartGoalList"></div>
  </section>

  <section id="profile" class="page">
    <button class="icon-btn back" onclick="closePages()">←</button>
    <h2 data-i18n="profile">Perfil</h2>
    <p class="page-desc" data-i18n="profileDesc">Tu espacio personal de disciplina y progreso.</p>

    <div class="profile-hero">
      <div class="profile-avatar" style="font-size:42px;color:white;">❦</div>
      <h3 id="profileName">Usuario</h3>
      <p id="profileMessage">Cada hábito completado construye una mejor versión de ti.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="profile-grid">
      <div class="stat"><span data-i18n="streak">Racha</span><br><b id="streak">0</b> días</div>
      <div class="stat"><span data-i18n="completed">Completados</span><br><b id="completed">0</b></div>
      <div class="stat"><span data-i18n="habits">Hábitos</span><br><b id="habitCount">0</b></div>
      <div class="stat"><span data-i18n="goals">Objetivos</span><br><b id="goalCount">0</b></div>
    </div>

    <div class="profile-box" style="margin-top:16px">
      <div class="stat"><span data-i18n="saved">Datos guardados localmente</span></div>
      <div class="stat"><span>Eureka IA</span><br><p id="profileAi" style="margin-top:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);line-height:1.5">Tu progreso todavía es pequeño, pero ya has empezado. Y eso te pone por delante de mucha gente.</p></div>
    </div>

    <button class="profile-action">🎵 Cambiar ambiente</button>
    <button class="profile-action">🌙 Modo concentración</button>
    <button class="profile-action logout" onclick="logout()">Cerrar sesión</button>
  </section>

  <section id="ai" class="page">
    <button class="icon-btn back" onclick="closePages()">←</button>
    <h2>Eureka IA</h2>
    <p class="page-desc" data-i18n="aiDesc">Una IA que te acompaña, te recuerda las cosas y te habla claro cuando hace falta.</p>

    <div class="ai-mode">
      <div class="ai-message motivate">
        <span>EUREKA IA · APOYO</span>
        <div id="aiMotivate">
          A veces no necesitas motivación. Necesitas empezar aunque no tengas ganas.
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ai-message direct">
        <span>EUREKA IA · DIRECTO</span>
        <div id="aiDirect">
          Si sigues esperando el momento perfecto, vas a seguir exactamente igual dentro de un mes.
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ai-message">
        <span>EUREKA IA · RECORDATORIOS</span>
        <div id="aiReminder">
          Tus hábitos aparecerán automáticamente en la pantalla principal para ayudarte a mantener el enfoque.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ai-question">
      <p style="margin-bottom:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.68);line-height:1.5" data-i18n="askAi">Pregúntale una duda a Eureka IA.</p>
      <textarea id="aiQuestion" placeholder="Ej: ¿Cómo empiezo si no tengo ganas?" data-ph-es="Ej: ¿Cómo empiezo si no tengo ganas?" data-ph-en="Example: How do I start if I don't feel like it?"></textarea>
      <button class="primary" onclick="askEureka()" data-i18n="askButton">PREGUNTAR</button>
      <div class="ai-answer" id="aiAnswer"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="ai-actions">
      <button onclick="generateMotivation()">✨ Motivarme</button>
      <button onclick="generateReality()">⚡ Decirme la verdad</button>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>

<script>
let lang = localStorage.getItem("ep_lang") || "es";
let currentUser = localStorage.getItem("ep_current_user") || "";
let muted = localStorage.getItem("ep_muted") === "true";

const texts = {
  es:{
    start:"EMPEZAR", welcome:"Bienvenido", welcomeText:"Entra en tu espacio de enfoque. Tus hábitos y objetivos se guardarán en este usuario.",
    enter:"ENTRAR", register:"Registrarse", profileShort:"Perfil", habitDay:"HÁBITO DEL DÍA", mainGoal:"OBJETIVO PRINCIPAL",
    habits:"Hábitos", goals:"Objetivos", profile:"Perfil", habitsDesc:"Organiza tu semana y convierte tus hábitos en una rutina clara.", startHabits:"EMPEZAR HÁBITOS", askHabit:"¿Qué hábito quieres hacer?", askDays:"¿Qué días de la semana?", askTime:"¿Cuánto tiempo?", askNote:"Nota rápida", createRoutine:"CREAR RUTINA SEMANAL", weeklyCalendar:"CALENDARIO SEMANAL", monthlyTracker:"TRACKER MENSUAL", goalsDesc:"Una pizarra inteligente para convertir deseos en objetivos reales.", smartBoard:"PIZARRA INTELIGENTE", smartBoardText:"Responde con sinceridad. La app ordenará tu objetivo y te recordará el precio que estás dispuesto a pagar.", createSmartGoal:"CREAR OBJETIVO INTELIGENTE", monthHelp:"Pulsa un día del mes para dejar preparado qué hábito toca ese día.",
    streak:"Racha", completed:"Completados", saved:"Datos guardados localmente", profileDesc:"Tu espacio personal de disciplina y progreso.", aiDesc:"Una IA que te acompaña, te recuerda las cosas y te habla claro cuando hace falta.", askAi:"Pregúntale una duda a Eureka IA.", askButton:"PREGUNTAR",
    loginError:"Escribe usuario y contraseña.", created:"Usuario creado. Ya puedes entrar.", wrong:"Contraseña incorrecta.",
    quotes:["La disciplina empieza cuando dejas de esperar motivación.","No lo pienses tanto. Empieza con diez minutos.","Hoy no necesitas hacerlo perfecto. Necesitas hacerlo.","Tu futuro se construye con lo que haces ahora."]
  },
  en:{
    start:"START", welcome:"Welcome", welcomeText:"Enter your focus space. Your habits and goals will be saved in this user.",
    enter:"ENTER", register:"Register", profileShort:"Profile", habitDay:"DAILY HABIT", mainGoal:"MAIN GOAL",
    habits:"Habits", goals:"Goals", profile:"Profile", habitsDesc:"Organize your week and turn your habits into a clear routine.", startHabits:"START HABITS", askHabit:"What habit do you want to do?", askDays:"Which days of the week?", askTime:"How much time?", askNote:"Quick note", createRoutine:"CREATE WEEKLY ROUTINE", weeklyCalendar:"WEEKLY CALENDAR", monthlyTracker:"MONTHLY TRACKER", goalsDesc:"A smart board to turn wishes into real goals.", smartBoard:"SMART BOARD", smartBoardText:"Answer honestly. The app will organize your goal and remind you of the price you are willing to pay.", createSmartGoal:"CREATE SMART GOAL", monthHelp:"Tap a day of the month to prepare which habit belongs to that day.",
    streak:"Streak", completed:"Completed", saved:"Data saved locally", profileDesc:"Your personal space for discipline and progress.", aiDesc:"An AI that supports you, reminds you things and tells you the truth when needed.", askAi:"Ask Eureka AI a question.", askButton:"ASK",
    loginError:"Write username and password.", created:"User created. You can log in now.", wrong:"Wrong password.",
    quotes:["Discipline starts when you stop waiting for motivation.","Do not think too much. Start with ten minutes.","Today does not need to be perfect. It needs to be done.","Your future is built with what you do now."]
  }
};

function userKey() { return "ep_user_" + currentUser; }
function defaultData() {
  return {
    habits:[{text:"1 hora de estudio",done:false}],
    goals:[{text:"Mejorar disciplina diaria",done:false}],
    weekPlan:{lunes:[],martes:[],miercoles:[],jueves:[],viernes:[],sabado:[],domingo:[]},
    monthPlan:{},
    smartGoals:[],
    streak:1
  };
}
function getData() {
  if(!currentUser) return defaultData();
  return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(userKey()) || JSON.stringify(defaultData()));
}
function saveData(d) { localStorage.setItem(userKey(), JSON.stringify(d)); }

function go(id) {
  document.querySelectorAll(".screen").forEach(s=>s.classList.remove("active"));
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add("active");
  if(id==="home") renderAll();
}
function register() {
  const u=user.value.trim(); const p=pass.value.trim();
  if(!u||!p) return loginError.textContent=texts[lang].loginError;
  localStorage.setItem("ep_pass_"+u,p);
  currentUser=u;
  localStorage.setItem("ep_current_user",u);
  if(!localStorage.getItem(userKey())) saveData(defaultData());
  loginError.textContent=texts[lang].created;
}
function login() {
  const u=user.value.trim(); const p=pass.value.trim();
  if(!u||!p) return loginError.textContent=texts[lang].loginError;
  const saved=localStorage.getItem("ep_pass_"+u);
  if(saved && saved!==p) return loginError.textContent=texts[lang].wrong;
  if(!saved) localStorage.setItem("ep_pass_"+u,p);
  currentUser=u;
  localStorage.setItem("ep_current_user",u);
  if(!localStorage.getItem(userKey())) saveData(defaultData());
  go("home");
}
function toggleLang() {
  lang = lang==="es" ? "en" : "es";
  localStorage.setItem("ep_lang",lang);
  
const motivateMsgs = [
  "No necesitas sentirte preparado para empezar.",
  "Diez minutos hoy valen más que prometerte empezar mañana.",
  "Cada día que apareces cuenta, incluso los malos.",
  "La disciplina se construye cuando haces las cosas sin ganas."
];

const directMsgs = [
  "Si sigues esperando motivación, seguirás parado.",
  "El móvil no es el problema. El problema es no poner límites.",
  "Tus objetivos no van a cumplirse solos.",
  "Lo difícil no es empezar fuerte. Es aparecer todos los días."
];

function generateMotivation() {
  aiMotivate.textContent = motivateMsgs[Math.floor(Math.random()*motivateMsgs.length)];
}

function generateReality() {
  aiDirect.textContent = directMsgs[Math.floor(Math.random()*directMsgs.length)];
}


function askEureka() {
  const q = aiQuestion.value.trim().toLowerCase();
  if(!q) return;
  let answer;
  if(q.includes("móvil") || q.includes("movil") || q.includes("phone")) {
    answer = lang==="es"
      ? "Déjalo lejos físicamente. No vale decir 'solo miro una cosa'. Si el móvil está cerca, manda él. Si está lejos, mandas tú."
      : "Put it physically away. Do not say 'just one look'. If the phone is close, it controls you. If it is away, you control yourself.";
  } else if(q.includes("ganas") || q.includes("motiv") || q.includes("feel")) {
    answer = lang==="es"
      ? "No esperes a tener ganas. Empieza con 5 minutos. La motivación suele llegar después de empezar, no antes."
      : "Do not wait to feel like it. Start with 5 minutes. Motivation usually comes after starting, not before.";
  } else if(q.includes("estudi") || q.includes("study")) {
    answer = lang==="es"
      ? "Divide el estudio en bloques pequeños: 25 minutos de enfoque y 5 de descanso. Hoy no intentes hacerlo perfecto, intenta hacerlo real."
      : "Split studying into small blocks: 25 minutes of focus and 5 minutes of rest. Today do not make it perfect, make it real.";
  } else if(q.includes("objetivo") || q.includes("goal")) {
    answer = lang==="es"
      ? "Un objetivo sin calendario es solo una idea. Ponle día, hora y una acción pequeña para empezar."
      : "A goal without a calendar is only an idea. Give it a day, a time and one small action to start.";
  } else {
    answer = lang==="es"
      ? "Te lo digo claro: simplifica. Elige una sola acción, hazla 10 minutos y luego decides si sigues. Lo importante ahora es romper la inercia."
      : "I will be clear: simplify. Choose one action, do it for 10 minutes, then decide if you continue. The important thing now is breaking inertia.";
  }
  aiAnswer.textContent = answer;
}

applyLang();
}
function toggleSound() {
  muted=!muted;
  localStorage.setItem("ep_muted",muted);
  document.querySelectorAll("#soundBtn,#soundBtn2").forEach(b=>b.textContent=muted?"🔇":"🔊");
}
function applyLang() {
  document.documentElement.lang=lang;
  document.querySelectorAll("[data-i18n]").forEach(el=>{
    const k=el.dataset.i18n;
    if(texts[lang][k]) el.textContent=texts[lang][k];
  });
  document.querySelectorAll("[data-ph-es]").forEach(el=>el.placeholder=el.dataset["ph"+(lang==="es"?"Es":"En")]);
  document.querySelectorAll("#langBtn,#langBtn2").forEach(b=>b.textContent=lang==="es"?"🇪🇸":"🇬🇧");
  document.querySelectorAll("#soundBtn,#soundBtn2").forEach(b=>b.textContent=muted?"🔇":"🔊");
  document.getElementById("quote").textContent = texts[lang].quotes[new Date().getDate()%texts[lang].quotes.length];
}
function updateClock() {
  const now=new Date();
  clock.textContent=now.toLocaleTimeString(lang==="es"?"es-ES":"en-GB",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"});
  date.textContent=now.toLocaleDateString(lang==="es"?"es-ES":"en-GB",{weekday:"long",day:"numeric",month:"long"});
}
function openPage(id) {
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add("active");
  renderAll();
}
function closePages() { document.querySelectorAll(".page").forEach(p=>p.classList.remove("active")); }
function addHabit() {
  const v=habitInput.value.trim(); if(!v) return;
  const d=getData(); d.habits.push({text:v,done:false,missed:false}); saveData(d); habitInput.value=""; renderAll();
}
function addGoal() {
  const v=goalInput.value.trim(); if(!v) return;
  const d=getData(); d.goals.push({text:v,done:false}); saveData(d); goalInput.value=""; renderAll();
}
function toggleHabit(i) { const d=getData(); d.habits[i].done=!d.habits[i].done; saveData(d); renderAll(); }
function toggleGoal(i) { const d=getData(); d.goals[i].done=!d.goals[i].done; saveData(d); renderAll(); }
function delHabit(i) { const d=getData(); d.habits.splice(i,1); saveData(d); renderAll(); }
function delGoal(i) { const d=getData(); d.goals.splice(i,1); saveData(d); renderAll(); }

function toggleWeekForm() {
  weekForm.classList.toggle("active");
}

let selectedMonthDay = null;

let pickedDays = [];
function setQuickHabit(v) {
  weekHabit.value = v;
}
function toggleDayPick(event) {
  event.preventDefault();
  const btn = event.currentTarget;
  const day = btn.dataset.day;
  if(pickedDays.includes(day)) {
    pickedDays = pickedDays.filter(d=>d!==day);
    btn.classList.remove("selected");
  } else {
    pickedDays.push(day);
    btn.classList.add("selected");
  }
  weekDays.value = "custom";
}
function syncPresetDays() {
  const days = selectedDays(weekDays.value);
  pickedDays = weekDays.value === "custom" ? pickedDays : days;
  document.querySelectorAll("#dayPicks button").forEach(btn=>{
    btn.classList.toggle("selected", pickedDays.includes(btn.dataset.day));
  });
}
function markHabit(i, done) {
  const d=getData();
  d.habits[i].done = done;
  d.habits[i].missed = !done;
  saveData(d);
  renderAll();
}

function selectMonthDay(day) {
  selectedMonthDay = day;
  selectedDayLabel.textContent = (lang==="es" ? "Día seleccionado: " : "Selected day: ") + day;
}
function saveMonthHabit() {
  if(!selectedMonthDay) return;
  const v = monthHabitInput.value.trim();
  if(!v) return;
  const d = getData();
  if(!d.monthPlan) d.monthPlan = {};
  d.monthPlan[selectedMonthDay] = v;
  saveData(d);
  monthHabitInput.value = "";
  renderAll();
}
function createSmartGoal() {
  const goal = smartGoal.value.trim();
  if(!goal) return;
  const d = getData();
  if(!d.smartGoals) d.smartGoals = [];
  const sacrifice = smartSacrifice.value.trim();
  const deadline = smartDeadline.value.trim();
  const measure = smartMeasure.value.trim();
  const priority = smartPriority.value;
  d.smartGoals.unshift({
    goal,
    priority,
    deadline: deadline || (lang==="es" ? "Sin fecha" : "No date"),
    measure: measure || (lang==="es" ? "Progreso visible" : "Visible progress"),
    sacrifice: sacrifice || (lang==="es" ? "Reducir distracciones" : "Reduce distractions"),
    done:false
  });
  d.goals.unshift({text:goal,done:false});
  saveData(d);
  smartGoal.value="";
  smartDeadline.value="";
  smartMeasure.value="";
  smartSacrifice.value="";
  renderAll();
}
function toggleSmartGoal(i) {
  const d=getData();
  if(!d.smartGoals) d.smartGoals=[];
  d.smartGoals[i].done=!d.smartGoals[i].done;
  saveData(d);
  renderAll();
}
function delSmartGoal(i) {
  const d=getData();
  if(!d.smartGoals) d.smartGoals=[];
  d.smartGoals.splice(i,1);
  saveData(d);
  renderAll();
}

function selectedDays(type) {
  if(type==="custom") return pickedDays.length ? pickedDays : ["lunes"];
  if(type==="weekdays") return ["lunes","martes","miercoles","jueves","viernes"];
  if(type==="alternate") return ["lunes","miercoles","viernes"];
  if(type==="weekend") return ["sabado","domingo"];
  return ["lunes","martes","miercoles","jueves","viernes","sabado","domingo"];
}
function createWeeklyHabit() {
  const habit = weekHabit.value.trim();
  const time = weekTime.value.trim();
  const note = weekNote.value.trim();
  if(!habit) return;
  const d = getData();
  if(!d.weekPlan) d.weekPlan = {lunes:[],martes:[],miercoles:[],jueves:[],viernes:[],sabado:[],domingo:[]};
  selectedDays(weekDays.value).forEach(day=>{
    d.weekPlan[day].push({text:habit,time:time || "sin tiempo",note});
  });
  d.habits.push({text:habit + (time ? " · " + time : ""),done:false,missed:false});
  saveData(d);
  weekHabit.value="";
  weekTime.value="";
  weekNote.value="";
  weekForm.classList.remove("active");
  renderAll();
}


function logout() {
  localStorage.removeItem("ep_current_user");
  currentUser="";
  closePages();
  go("login");
}

function renderAll() {
  const d=getData();
  habitDay.textContent=d.habits[0]?.text || (lang==="es"?"Sin hábito":"No habit");
  mainGoal.textContent=d.goals[0]?.text || (lang==="es"?"Sin objetivo":"No goal");
  const nextHabit = d.habits.find(h=>!h.done);
  homeAlert.innerHTML = `<strong>EUREKA IA · RECORDATORIO</strong>${
    nextHabit 
      ? (lang==="es"
          ? `Dentro de 30 minutos tienes pendiente: <b>${nextHabit.text}</b>.`
          : `In 30 minutes you have pending: <b>${nextHabit.text}</b>.`)
      : (lang==="es"
          ? "No tienes hábitos pendientes por ahora."
          : "You have no pending habits right now.")
  }`;
  profileName.textContent=currentUser || "Usuario";
  streak.textContent=d.streak || 1;
  const completedCount = d.habits.filter(h=>h.done).length + d.goals.filter(g=>g.done).length;
  completed.textContent=completedCount;
  habitCount.textContent=d.habits.length;
  goalCount.textContent=d.goals.length;
  profileMessage.textContent = lang==="es"
    ? "La disciplina no aparece de golpe. Se construye día a día."
    : "Discipline does not appear instantly. It is built day by day.";
  profileAi.textContent = completedCount < 3
    ? (lang==="es"
      ? "Tu progreso todavía es pequeño, pero ya has empezado. Y eso te pone por delante de mucha gente."
      : "Your progress is still small, but you already started. That already puts you ahead of many people.")
    : (lang==="es"
      ? "Tus acciones empiezan a convertirse en una rutina. Mantén el ritmo."
      : "Your actions are becoming a routine. Keep the rhythm.");
  const doneHabits = d.habits.filter(h=>h.done).length;
  const failedHabits = d.habits.filter(h=>h.missed).length;
  const totalHabits = d.habits.length || 1;
  const percentHabits = Math.round((doneHabits / totalHabits) * 100);
  habitProgressBox.childNodes[0].textContent = lang==="es"
    ? `Seguimiento: ${doneHabits} hechos · ${failedHabits} no hechos · ${percentHabits}%`
    : `Tracking: ${doneHabits} done · ${failedHabits} missed · ${percentHabits}%`;
  habitProgressFill.style.width = percentHabits + "%";
  habitList.innerHTML=d.habits.map((h,i)=>`<div class="item ${h.done?'done':''}">
    <div class="check" onclick="toggleHabit(${i})">${h.done?'✓':(h.missed?'×':'')}</div>
    <div class="txt">${h.text}${h.missed && !h.done ? '<br><small style="color:var(--pink)">No hecho</small>' : ''}</div>
    <button class="del" onclick="delHabit(${i})">×</button>
    <div class="track-actions" style="flex-basis:100%">
      <button class="done-btn" onclick="markHabit(${i},true)">${lang==="es"?"Hecho":"Done"}</button>
      <button class="fail-btn" onclick="markHabit(${i},false)">${lang==="es"?"No lo hice":"Missed"}</button>
    </div>
  </div>`).join("");
  goalList.innerHTML=d.goals.map((g,i)=>`<div class="item ${g.done?'done':''}"><div class="check" onclick="toggleGoal(${i})">${g.done?'✓':''}</div><div class="txt">${g.text}</div><button class="del" onclick="delGoal(${i})">×</button></div>`).join("");
  if(!d.smartGoals) d.smartGoals=[];
  smartGoalList.innerHTML=d.smartGoals.map((g,i)=>`<div class="smart-card ${g.done?'done':''}">
    <span class="tag">${g.priority}</span>
    <h4>${g.goal}</h4>
    <p><b>${lang==="es"?"Fecha":"Deadline"}:</b> ${g.deadline}</p>
    <p><b>${lang==="es"?"Medida":"Measure"}:</b> ${g.measure}</p>
    <p><b>${lang==="es"?"Sacrificio":"Sacrifice"}:</b> ${g.sacrifice}</p>
    <p><b>Eureka IA:</b> ${lang==="es"?"Si de verdad lo quieres, tu calendario tiene que demostrarlo. Empieza por una acción pequeña hoy.":"If you really want it, your calendar has to prove it. Start with one small action today."}</p>
    <div class="smart-actions"><button onclick="toggleSmartGoal(${i})">${g.done ? "✓" : (lang==="es"?"Marcar avance":"Mark progress")}</button><button onclick="delSmartGoal(${i})">×</button></div>
  </div>`).join("");
  if(!d.monthPlan) d.monthPlan = {};
  const now = new Date();
  const year = now.getFullYear();
  const month = now.getMonth();
  const first = new Date(year, month, 1);
  const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
  const startOffset = (first.getDay() + 6) % 7;
  const monthName = now.toLocaleDateString(lang==="es"?"es-ES":"en-GB",{month:"long",year:"numeric"});
  monthTitle.textContent = monthName.toUpperCase();
  const heads = lang==="es" ? ["L","M","X","J","V","S","D"] : ["M","T","W","T","F","S","S"];
  let cells = heads.map(h=>`<div class="week-head">${h}</div>`).join("");
  for(let i=0;i<startOffset;i++) cells += `<div class="day empty"></div>`;
  for(let day=1; day<=daysInMonth; day++){
    const plan=d.monthPlan[day];
    const active=day<=d.habits.filter(h=>h.done).length;
    cells += `<div class="day ${active?'active':''} ${plan?'has-plan':''}" onclick="selectMonthDay(${day})">${day}${plan?`<small>${plan}</small>`:""}</div>`;
  }
  calendar.innerHTML=cells;
  if(!d.weekPlan) d.weekPlan = {lunes:[],martes:[],miercoles:[],jueves:[],viernes:[],sabado:[],domingo:[]};
  const names = lang==="es" 
    ? {lunes:"LUN",martes:"MAR",miercoles:"MIÉ",jueves:"JUE",viernes:"VIE",sabado:"SÁB",domingo:"DOM"}
    : {lunes:"MON",martes:"TUE",miercoles:"WED",jueves:"THU",viernes:"FRI",sabado:"SAT",domingo:"SUN"};
  weekGrid.innerHTML = Object.keys(names).map(day=>`<div class="week-day"><b>${names[day]}</b>${(d.weekPlan[day]||[]).map(t=>`<div class="week-task">${t.text}<br><small>${t.time}${t.note ? " · " + t.note : ""}</small></div>`).join("")}</div>`).join("");
  const missing=d.habits.filter(h=>!h.done).length;
  aiMsg.textContent = lang==="es" ? `Tienes ${missing} hábitos pendientes. No necesitas hacerlos todos ahora: empieza por uno y rompe la inercia.` : `You have ${missing} pending habits. You do not need to do everything now: start with one and break the inertia.`;
}

const motivateMsgs = [
  "No necesitas sentirte preparado para empezar.",
  "Diez minutos hoy valen más que prometerte empezar mañana.",
  "Cada día que apareces cuenta, incluso los malos.",
  "La disciplina se construye cuando haces las cosas sin ganas."
];

const directMsgs = [
  "Si sigues esperando motivación, seguirás parado.",
  "El móvil no es el problema. El problema es no poner límites.",
  "Tus objetivos no van a cumplirse solos.",
  "Lo difícil no es empezar fuerte. Es aparecer todos los días."
];

function generateMotivation() {
  aiMotivate.textContent = motivateMsgs[Math.floor(Math.random()*motivateMsgs.length)];
}

function generateReality() {
  aiDirect.textContent = directMsgs[Math.floor(Math.random()*directMsgs.length)];
}


function askEureka() {
  const q = aiQuestion.value.trim().toLowerCase();
  if(!q) return;
  let answer;
  if(q.includes("móvil") || q.includes("movil") || q.includes("phone")) {
    answer = lang==="es"
      ? "Déjalo lejos físicamente. No vale decir 'solo miro una cosa'. Si el móvil está cerca, manda él. Si está lejos, mandas tú."
      : "Put it physically away. Do not say 'just one look'. If the phone is close, it controls you. If it is away, you control yourself.";
  } else if(q.includes("ganas") || q.includes("motiv") || q.includes("feel")) {
    answer = lang==="es"
      ? "No esperes a tener ganas. Empieza con 5 minutos. La motivación suele llegar después de empezar, no antes."
      : "Do not wait to feel like it. Start with 5 minutes. Motivation usually comes after starting, not before.";
  } else if(q.includes("estudi") || q.includes("study")) {
    answer = lang==="es"
      ? "Divide el estudio en bloques pequeños: 25 minutos de enfoque y 5 de descanso. Hoy no intentes hacerlo perfecto, intenta hacerlo real."
      : "Split studying into small blocks: 25 minutes of focus and 5 minutes of rest. Today do not make it perfect, make it real.";
  } else if(q.includes("objetivo") || q.includes("goal")) {
    answer = lang==="es"
      ? "Un objetivo sin calendario es solo una idea. Ponle día, hora y una acción pequeña para empezar."
      : "A goal without a calendar is only an idea. Give it a day, a time and one small action to start.";
  } else {
    answer = lang==="es"
      ? "Te lo digo claro: simplifica. Elige una sola acción, hazla 10 minutos y luego decides si sigues. Lo importante ahora es romper la inercia."
      : "I will be clear: simplify. Choose one action, do it for 10 minutes, then decide if you continue. The important thing now is breaking inertia.";
  }
  aiAnswer.textContent = answer;
}

applyLang();
updateClock();
setInterval(updateClock,1000);
if(currentUser) { user.value=currentUser; }
</script>
</body>
</html>
